title: Klein 4 Harmonics PASS: group axioms + harmonic orbit proofs
_fixture_purpose: Anchor fixture. Two theorems certified simultaneously. (1) GROUP: The four sign-changes of (F,C,G) form K4=Z2×Z2. Every element is self-inverse. I₁∘I₂=I₃. (2) HARMONIC ACTION: I₁ swaps H↔I; I₂ maps (H,I)→(-I,-H); I₃ negates both. PROOFS: I₁(-F,C): H'=C-F=I, I'=C+F=H ✓. I₂(F,-C): H'=(-C)+F=-(C-F)=-I, I'=(-C)-F=-(C+F)=-H ✓. I₃(-F,-C): H'=(-C)+(-F)=-(C+F)=-H, I'=(-C)-(-F)=F-C=-(C-F)=-I ✓. COORDINATE: I₁ corresponds to (d,e)→(e,d) [physical swap]; I₂ and I₃ are formal algebraic operations. All four preserve F²+C²=G².

group_table_legend.self_inverse: diagonal is all 0 (every element squares to identity)

algebraic_proof.pythagorean_invariance: F²+C²=G² iff (-F)²+C²=G² iff F²+(-C)²=G² iff (-F)²+(-C)²=G² — sign changes are transparent to squares

witnesses.orbit_set: { (7,1), (1,7), (-1,-7), (-7,-1) } — four corners of the harmonic packet

connections.cert_137: H=C+F and I=C-F defined in Koenig twisted squares; H²-G²=G²-I²=2CF; K4 action permutes {I,H,-I,-H}
connections.cert_125: F=Qr=red, C=Qg=green, G=Qb=blue; I₁=(d,e)→(e,d)=red reflection; I₂=(d,e)→(d,-e)=green reflection
connections.cert_140: I=C-F is conic discriminant; K4 swaps H↔I (I₁) = swaps ellipse↔hyperbola boundary values
connections.cert_141: I=-(x²-2y²) Pell norm; I₁ maps I→H, i.e. maps P(d-e,e) to C+F=H

validation_checks.description: F,C,G,H,I values correct for all witnesses
group table is K4=Z2×Z2 (4×4, self-inverse, abelian)
